markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To refine the client sprint process for predictability and higher quality outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3533.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** The current sprint process is unpredictable, with a declining conversion rate (\~70%) that is unsustainable for the business. This is caused by insufficient pre-kickoff research, leading to a lack of client trust and poor strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3701.0)
  - [**Solution:** Implement a "Day Zero" process to shift deep strategic work (10–20+ hours) before the kickoff. This builds immediate client trust and enables a more prescriptive, high-value engagement from the start.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [**New Offer:** A "Mini-Sprint" ($20k–$30k) will be sold to non-ICP clients. It delivers a full strategy and platform setup, offloading the editorial burden to the client and freeing up internal resources for high-value accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3050.0)
  - [**Ownership:** George is the DRI for defining and scaling the new sprint process. He will partner with Sales to create a repeatable playbook that can be used to onboard new directors (Hassan, William).](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)

## Topics

### The Sprint Problem: Unpredictability & Declining Conversion

  - [The 8-week strategy sprint is inconsistent, with a declining conversion rate from 100% to \~70%.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3701.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Insufficient pre-kickoff research and a poor sales-to-delivery handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
      - [Strategists often review sales docs only hours before a kickoff, preventing deep internalization of client context.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
      - [This leads to generic questions and a failure to build immediate trust.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [**Consequences:**](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
      - [**Client Churn:** The Clerks account failed after a key stakeholder (Director of Product) was introduced late and found the work misaligned with expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
      - [**Unsustainable Model:** The current conversion rate requires an unrealistic 4 kickoffs per week to hit growth targets.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3701.0)

### The Solution: A "Day Zero" Process for Deep Research

  - [The "Day Zero" concept shifts deep, non-customer-facing research to before the kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [**Goal:** Enable the strategist to arrive at the kickoff with expert-level knowledge of the client's business, building immediate trust.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [**Example (Airbyte):** Eric's 2-day deep dive (reviewing LinkedIn, YouTube, etc.) for a 1-hour CEO interview yielded a 12-week thought leadership series.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Impact:** The CEO was "blown away," solidifying the $40k/mo upsell and validating the value of the engagement to the CFO.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Required Effort:** This deep research is a 10–20+ hour investment per client, not a quick checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=5091.0)

### New Offer: The "Mini-Sprint"

  - [A new offer for non-ICP clients (e.g., Seed/Series A, those focused on "word babysitting").](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3050.0)
  - [**Scope:** A 2-week engagement delivering a full strategy and platform setup.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3050.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** Company context, a catalog of opportunities, and a system with analytics and assignment templates.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3098.0)
      - [**Cost:** $20k–$30k.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3090.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Offloads the high-touch editorial burden from internal resources, freeing them for high-value accounts like Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3050.0)

### Scaling & Ownership

  - [**Resource Constraint:** The team lacks the bandwidth for deep research, as top performers (George, Eric) are already on high-value accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=4219.0)
  - [**Process Ownership:** George is the DRI for defining and scaling the new sprint process.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)
  - [**Sales Handoff:** A recurring meeting between Sales and George is needed to ensure the strategist receives all necessary context.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
  - [**Platform Dependency:** The "Mini-Sprint" is contingent on the platform being ready for client login, which is targeted for the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=4334.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:** Define the end-to-end sprint process, including roles, responsibilities, and handoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)
  - [**George & Sales:** Schedule a recurring meeting to formalize the sales-to-sprint handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
  - [**George & Sales:** Use the upcoming kickoffs (next week, Jan 5, Jan 12) as test cases to refine the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=5180.0)
  - [**Leadership:** Assess resource needs for the "Day Zero" research role to ensure scalability.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=5128.0)
  - [**Daniel:** Confirm the platform's readiness for client login by the end of January to enable the "Mini-Sprint" offer.](https://fathom.video/share/mEJzLF-R8MypHWDmBqioXMfQAz2Bst8U?tab=summary&timestamp=4334.0)
